subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: Abraham's migration precipitated the manifestation and appearance of Moses, Christ, Muhammad, the Exalted One, and Baha'u'llah.
subcodes.first_line_orig: هجرت حضرت ابراهیم خلیل سبب ظهور و پیدایش حضرت کلیم ، حضرت مسیح
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @episodes from the early history of Islam, @banishments of Baha'u'llah, @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael
